Z.W. also reports having received royalty payments for inventions or discoveries related to cardiovascular diagnostics or therapeutics from Cleveland Heart Lab, a fully owned subsidiary of Quest Diagnostics and Procter & Gamble. C.M.T. consults for Abbott Laboratories. S.L.H. reports being named as co-inventor on pending and issued patents held by the Cleveland Clinic relating to cardiovascular diagnostics and therapeutics, being a paid consultant for Procter & Gamble and Zehna Therapeutics, having received research funds from Procter & Gamble, Zehna Therapeutics, and Roche Diagnostics, and being eligible to receive royalty payments for inventions or discoveries related to cardiovascular diagnostics or therapeutics from Cleveland HeartLab and Procter & Gamble. All other authors: Z.L., M.G., A.Z., X.F., K.M., M.M., X.S.L., Z.Y., J.M., T.T., K.C., M.H., L.H., K.G., T.T.V., D.W., A.M.G., P.Q., C.A.M., J.M.B., D.J.L., D.A.W., and T.E.S. have no competing interests.
